results.title: T cell functions of psoriatic arthritis patients are regulated differently by TNF, IL-17A and IL-6 receptor blockades in vitro.
results.abstract: The impact of biologics used in PsA management on T cells is unknown. This study evaluated the effect of tumour necrosis factor-alpha (TNFα), interleukin-17A (IL-17A), and IL-6 receptor (IL-6R) blockers on T cell function in PsA patients and healthy controls peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs).
